arts.ttl: Fulham 1-1 Arsenal: Match report and talking points as Gunners lose ground in title race
arts.sum: The key takeaways from a damaging 1-1 draw for the Gunners.

arts.ttl: Arteta 'very disappointed' not to beat Fulham
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is "very disappointed" his side did not beat Fulham after the Gunners had a late goal disallowed at Craven Cottage.

arts.ttl: Arsenal stumble at Fulham after Saka’s late strike ruled out for offside
arts.sum: The good news is that it was better for Arsenal than last season. The bad news is that their run of successive wins was ended at four and they spurned an opportunity to apply pressure to the leaders Liverpool. And worse, they were denied an 89th-minute winner by a tight – but correct – VAR offside call. Liverpool may feel that, with six players out injured and Everton having put four past Wolves on Wednesday, the postponement of Saturday’s Merseyside derby provided a welcome break before the rigours of the festive programme. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Odegaard says ‘sloppy’ Arsenal must focus on themselves
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard admitted Arsenal ‘were a bit sloppy’ after the Gunners were held to a 1-1 draw at Fulham. Arsenal missed the chance to close the gap on Premier League leaders Liverpool after drawing at Craven Cottage on Sunday. arts.ttl: Arsenal’s title hopes hit as Fulham hold Gunners to Craven Cottage draw
arts.sum: Raul Jimenez puts the hosts ahead before William Saliba levelled after the break.

arts.ttl: Fulham 1-1 Arsenal: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Gunners suffer massive Premier League title blow
arts.sum: Arsenal have a late winner excruciatingly chalked off in a 1-1 Premier League draw with Fulham at Craven Cottage, as their hopes of top-flight glory suffer another blow.

arts.ttl: Premier League issue statement on Bukayo Saka disallowed goal for Arsenal at Fulham
arts.sum: William Saliba scored his second goal in as many games during Arsenal's Premier League match away to Fulham, though it initially looked as though the effort would be disallowed
